response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development skills with experience in distributed systems, cloud technologies, and open-source projects. However, his background lacks deep C++ expertise (a hard requirement) and direct technical leadership in cloud compute platforms, though his mentorship and project ownership are notable.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems, microservices, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven track record of mentoring, knowledge-sharing, and technical leadership in collaborative environments.
Diverse project ownership, including open-source platforms and developer tooling, showcasing architectural and problem-solving skills.
concerns: Only limited C++ experience (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
Technical leadership roles are indirect (e.g., mentoring, workshops) rather than formal team leadership in cloud compute.
Primary expertise lies in full-stack/web development, with less focus on low-level compute or hardware architecture.
